title: Manufacturing Engineer - Ambuja Cements - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Ambuja Cements - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
